residuals.risk: Transport metadata or ACK is mistaken for identity, delivery or operator acceptance.
residuals.disposition: Application identity, signature and append-only semantic reducer remain authoritative.
residuals.gate_or_task: open-spec-messaging and every adapter conformance gate
residuals.stop_condition: Reject any derived state based only on bearer identity or transport acknowledgement.

residuals.risk: False operator acceptance creates an unsafe expectation of response.
residuals.disposition: Acceptance requires gateway receipt, operator seen, authorized role, verified signature and causal references.
residuals.stop_condition: Any false operator acceptance is an absolute gate failure.

residuals.risk: Invalid or expired possible distress is silently discarded during minimization.
residuals.disposition: Preserve it as unverified_distress in EvidenceVault or ReviewQuarantine with access, audit and retention review.
residuals.stop_condition: Silent discard or automatic authentication fails closed.

residuals.risk: Operators misunderstand queued, transmitted, received, seen, accepted or cancel-requested states under stress.
residuals.disposition: Keep semantics and copy explicit; validate comprehension only with the authorized P1a participant protocol.
residuals.stop_condition: No usability or stress-performance claim without participant evidence.

residuals.risk: Synthetic cryptography does not prove hardware key custody, theft resistance or wipe.
residuals.disposition: Reuse P0 protocol evidence but keep physical custody unverified until exact terminal evidence exists.
residuals.gate_or_task: P1a-03 secure storage and stolen-device protocol
residuals.stop_condition: No hardware-security claim from fixtures or software replay.

residuals.risk: Location is displayed with false precision, unknown provenance or hidden staleness.
residuals.disposition: Contract requires representation, source, precision, capture time and stale flag.
residuals.gate_or_task: human-message-content schema and future UI conformance
residuals.stop_condition: Reject or qualify any location lacking those fields.

residuals.risk: Vocabulary, language or accessibility differs across teams and jurisdictions.
residuals.disposition: Core status vocabulary includes unknown; localized labels and accessible terminal behavior remain implementation profiles.
residuals.stop_condition: Do not claim cross-team human interoperability without the selected language/accessibility evidence.

residuals.risk: Revocation data is stale during partitions.
residuals.disposition: Continue receiving possible distress, mark trust stale and restrict enrolment, policy changes and sensitive federation operations.
residuals.gate_or_task: application security profile and OS-06 federation
residuals.stop_condition: Never block preservation of distress solely because revocation freshness is unavailable.

residuals.risk: A content size fits one bearer but fragments or fails on another.
residuals.disposition: Each implementation sets measured byte limits; SOS must fit one authorized transport unit or that profile is disabled.
residuals.stop_condition: No SOS bearer profile without exact size and data-rate conformance.

residuals.risk: Life-safety preservation accumulates sensitive data beyond operational need.
residuals.disposition: Require scoped access, audit, incident closure and reviewed retention disposition; never use automatic destructive minimization for unresolved distress.
residuals.gate_or_task: OS-08 conformance kit and incident close SOP
residuals.stop_condition: Unreviewed indefinite retention or destructive deletion blocks implementation promotion.

residuals.risk: Human messages are inserted as sensor observations or fusion facts.
residuals.disposition: The open boundary keeps HumanMessage as a separate operational event; conversion to annotation requires an authorized action.
residuals.stop_condition: Reject direct writes from messaging adapters into consolidated facts.
